# BUILD PLAN: PermitFlow System

## Generated by The Project Conductor (Phase 3 - Orchestration)

### Executive Summary
This plan transforms the creative vision from Phase 1-2 into executable tasks with clear dependencies, estimates, and ownership.

**Project:** PermitFlow   
**Vision:** "The permit system that finds you before you go looking"  
**MVP Timeline:** 2-3 weeks  
**Team:** Full-stack developer (solo implementation)

---

## Phase 4: Implementation Tasks

### Epic 1: Foundation & Setup (Days 1-2)

#### Task 1.1: Initialize Repository
**ID:** T1.1   
**Status:** 🔲 Backlog  
**Priority:** P0 (Critical)  
**Estimate:** 2 hours  
**Dependencies:** None  

**Description:**
Set up Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and initial folder structure.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Next.js 14+ with App Router initialized
- [ ] TypeScript configured with strict mode
- [ ] Tailwind CSS configured with custom theme
- [ ] ESLint + Prettier configured
- [ ] Folder structure: `/app`, `/components`, `/lib`, `/types`
- [ ] Git repository initialized with `.gitignore`
- [ ] Initial commit with README

---

#### Task 1.2: Database Schema Setup
**ID:** T1.2   
**Priority:** P0   
**Estimate:** 3 hours  
**Dependencies:** T1.1  

**Description:**
Create PostgreSQL schema with Prisma ORM for users, properties, permits, predictions, and historical data.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Prisma schema defined for all entities
- [ ] Migration files created
- [ ] Seed script with mock historical permits (100 records)
- [ ] Database connection configured
- [ ] Type-safe database client generated

**Schema Coverage:**
- `User`, `Property`, `Permit`
- `Prediction`, `Conversation`, `HistoricalPermit`
- Relationships and indexes

---

#### Task 1.3: Authentication System
**ID:** T1.3   
**Priority:** P0   
**Estimate:** 4 hours  
**Dependencies:** T1.2  

**Description:**
Implement user authentication with NextAuth.js (email/password + OAuth).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] NextAuth.js configured with Prisma adapter
- [ ] Email/password login working
- [ ] Google OAuth integrated
- [ ] Protected routes middleware
- [ ] Session management with JWT
- [ ] Password hashing with bcrypt

---

### Epic 2: PermitFlow AI - Predictions (Days 3-5)

#### Task 2.1: Intent Detection Service
**ID:** T2.1   
**Priority:** P1 (High)   
**Estimate:** 6 hours  
**Dependencies:** T1.3  

**Description:**
Build NLP service to extract project intent from user descriptions using OpenAI API.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Intent detection API endpoint (`/api/predictions/analyze`)
- [ ] Structured extraction: action, structure, location, size
- [ ] Confidence scoring (0-100)
- [ ] Error handling for ambiguous input
- [ ] Unit tests with 10 test cases

---

#### Task 2.2: Rule Engine
**ID:** T2.2   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 8 hours  
**Dependencies:** T2.1  

**Description:**
Implement forward-chaining rule engine to match extracted intent against permit requirements.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Rule definition schema (YAML/JSON)
- [ ] Rule engine with AND/OR logic
- [ ] 5 initial permit types: deck, fence, electrical, plumbing, HVAC
- [ ] Confidence calculation based on rule matching
- [ ] Jurisdiction-specific rules support

---

#### Task 2.3: Prediction API & UI
**ID:** T2.3   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 6 hours  
**Dependencies:** T2.2  

**Description:**
Create prediction UI component and API endpoint for displaying permit recommendations.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Prediction REST API (`/api/predictions`)
- [ ] React component: `<PermitPredictor />`
- [ ] Confidence badges with color coding
- [ ] Document checklist generation
- [ ] Save prediction to user account
- [ ] Integration with property profile

---

### Epic 3: Permit Concierge - Chat Interface (Days 6-8)

#### Task 3.1: Chat Interface Components
**ID:** T3.1   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 5 hours  
**Dependencies:** T1.3  

**Description:**
Build conversational UI with message bubbles, input area, and context display.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `<ChatInterface />` component
- [ ] Message bubble variants (user, assistant, system)
- [ ] Auto-scroll to latest message
- [ ] Typing indicator animation
- [ ] Message history persistence
- [ ] Responsive design (mobile/desktop)

---

#### Task 3.2: LLM Integration
**ID:** T3.2   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 6 hours  
**Dependencies:** T3.1  

**Description:**
Integrate OpenAI GPT-4 for natural language responses with context-aware prompting.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] OpenAI API client configured
- [ ] Prompt template with safety rules (prompt injection protection)
- [ ] Context injection (user permits, property data)
- [ ] Response streaming for real-time feel
- [ ] Cost tracking per conversation
- [ ] Fallback for API failures

---

#### Task 3.3: Intent Routing & Actions
**ID:** T3.3   
**Priority:** P2 (Medium)   
**Estimate:** 5 hours  
**Dependencies:** T3.2  

**Description:**
Build intent classifier to route conversations to appropriate actions (show checklist, create permit, etc.).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Intent classification: PERMIT_INQUIRY, STATUS_CHECK, DOCUMENT_HELP, GENERAL
- [ ] Action handlers for each intent
- [ ] Dynamic checklist generation
- [ ] Permit status lookup via chat
- [ ] Action buttons in chat responses

---

### Epic 4: Permit Theater - Visualization (Days 9-11)

#### Task 4.1: Status Pipeline
**ID:** T4.1   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 4 hours  
**Dependencies:** T1.3  

**Description:**
Create permit status state machine and tracking system.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] State machine: DRAFT → SUBMITTED → REVIEWING → REVISIONS → APPROVED
- [ ] Status history log
- [ ] Stage duration tracking
- [ ] Automatic stage transitions (simulated for MVP)
- [ ] WebSocket update channel

---

#### Task 4.2: Animation Components
**ID:** T4.2   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 8 hours  
**Dependencies:** T4.1  

**Description:**
Build theatrical animation components using Framer Motion.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `<StageVisualizer />` component
- [ ] Animated progress rings with gradients
- [ ] Stage transition animations (enter/exit)
- [ ] Particle effects for approval celebration
- [ ] Performance: 60fps on mobile
- [ ] Reduced motion support (accessibility)

---

#### Task 4.3: Timeline Prediction
**ID:** T4.3   
**Priority:** P2   
**Estimate:** 4 hours  
**Dependencies:** T4.2  

**Description:**
Calculate estimated completion dates based on current stage and historical averages.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ETA calculation algorithm
- [ ] Confidence intervals display
- [ ] Milestone prediction (inspection, approval dates)
- [ ] Visual timeline bar
- [ ] Days elapsed vs. estimated counter

---

### Epic 5: Time Machine - Analytics (Days 12-13)

#### Task 5.1: Historical Data Seeding
**ID:** T5.1   
**Priority:** P2   
**Estimate:** 3 hours  
**Dependencies:** T1.2  

**Description:**
Create seed data for historical permits with realistic timelines and attributes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 100 sample historical permits
- [ ] Realistic durations with variance
- [ ] Multiple permit types covered
- [ ] Geographic spread
- [ ] Complexity scoring

---

#### Task 5.2: Similarity Engine
**ID:** T5.2   
**Priority:** P2   
**Estimate:** 6 hours  
**Dependencies:** T5.1  

**Description:**
Build similarity matching to find comparable historical permits.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Similarity algorithm (type, size, location, complexity)
- [ ] Vector embeddings for permits
- [ ] Top-k matching (50 nearest neighbors)
- [ ] Similarity score calculation
- [ ] API endpoint: `/api/historical/similar`

---

#### Task 5.3: Comparison Dashboard
**ID:** T5.3   
**Priority:** P2   
**Estimate:** 5 hours  
**Dependencies:** T5.2, T4.1  

**Description:**
Create analytics dashboard showing user permit vs. historical comparison.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `<TimeMachine />` component
- [ ] Scatter plot visualization (canvas/SVG)
- [ ] Percentile calculation and display
- [ ] "Faster than X%" badges
- [ ] Insights cards (similar count, time saved)

---

### Epic 6: Dashboard & Navigation (Days 14-15)

#### Task 6.1: Main Dashboard Layout
**ID:** T6.1   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 6 hours  
**Dependencies:** T2.3, T3.3, T4.3, T5.3  

**Description:**
Build main dashboard layout integrating all four pillars.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Sidebar navigation
- [ ] Header with user profile
- [ ] Dashboard grid layout
- [ ] Mobile-responsive layout
- [ ] Quick action buttons

---

#### Task 6.2: Permit Management
**ID:** T6.2   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 5 hours  
**Dependencies:** T6.1  

**Description:**
CRUD operations for permits with form validation.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Permit list view
- [ ] Permit detail view
- [ ] Create permit form
- [ ] Edit/Delete permit
- [ ] Document upload (mock for MVP)
- [ ] Form validation with zod

---

### Epic 7: Testing & Polish (Days 16-17)

#### Task 7.1: Unit Tests
**ID:** T7.1   
**Priority:** P0   
**Estimate:** 8 hours  
**Dependencies:** ALL (parallel)  

**Description:**
Write comprehensive unit tests for business logic and components.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Rule engine tests (80%+ coverage)
- [ ] Intent detection tests
- [ ] Component tests with React Testing Library
- [ ] API route tests
- [ ] Utility function tests

---

#### Task 7.2: Integration Tests
**ID:** T7.2   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 4 hours  
**Dependencies:** T7.1  

**Description:**
End-to-end tests for critical user flows.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User signup/login flow
- [ ] Create permit flow
- [ ] Chat conversation flow
- [ ] Prediction generation flow
- [ ] Status tracking flow

---

#### Task 7.3: UI Polish & Accessibility
**ID:** T7.3   
**Priority:** P1   
**Estimate:** 6 hours  
**Dependencies:** ALL  

**Description:**
Polish UI, ensure accessibility compliance, and mobile optimization.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
- [ ] Keyboard navigation working
- [ ] Screen reader labels
- [ ] Color contrast verified
- [ ] Mobile touch targets 44px+
- [ ] Loading states
- [ ] Error boundaries

---

### Epic 8: Deployment (Day 18)

#### Task 8.1: Production Build
**ID:** T8.1   
**Priority:** P0   
**Estimate:** 2 hours  
**Dependencies:** T7.3  

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `next build` passes without errors
- [ ] Bundle size under 500KB (main)
- [ ] Environment variables configured
- [ ] Database migration run on prod

---

#### Task 8.2: Vercel Deployment
**ID:** T8.2   
**Priority:** P0   
**Estimate:** 2 hours  
**Dependencies:** T8.1  

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Vercel project configured
- [ ] Environment variables set
- [ ] Build command configured
- [ ] Custom domain (optional)
- [ ] Deployment successful

---

#### Task 8.3: Smoke Tests
**ID:** T8.3   
**Priority:** P0   
**Estimate:** 1 hour  
**Dependencies:** T8.2  

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Homepage loads < 3s
- [ ] Authentication flow works
- [ ] Create permit end-to-end
- [ ] Analytics page loads
- [ ] No console errors

---

## Technology Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript 5
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
- **Database:** PostgreSQL + Prisma
- **AI:** OpenAI GPT-4 API
- **Auth:** NextAuth.js
- **Testing:** Vitest + React Testing Library
- **Deployment:** Vercel

---

## Ready for Phase 4: Implementation

*Phase 3 Complete | Project Conductor out.*
